ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the author */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the author registered on the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category" TEXT /* Parent category of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who submitted the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "body" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5 stars) */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified purchaser */,
  "pros" TEXT /* Pros of the product mentioned in the review */,
  "cons" TEXT /* Cons of the product mentioned in the review */,
  "rating_breakdown" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_ratings" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product based on reviews */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "ratings_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ratings for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_votes" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., helpful, not helpful) */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the review */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "vote_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_flags" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of flag (e.g., spam, inappropriate) */,
  "flag_count" INTEGER /* Number of flags for the review */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date the flag was raised */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "flag_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author submitting the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was submitted */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, answer, feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author submitting the reply */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the reply was submitted */,
  "reply_type" TEXT /* Type of reply (e.g., answer, feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_replies_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES review_comments ("comment_id")
)
